frame_analyses.description: Title slide: 'Tips for how to win the laparoscopic suturing contests' by Kengo Hayashi
Text overlay explaining importance of laparoscopic surgery and suturing contests
Narrator states intention to show tips for winning suturing contests
Rules slide showing Japanese contest procedure: needle insertion, stitching, square knot, cutting
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Contest format explanation with 3-0 needle and braided thread

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Training setup with suture material and instruments visible

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating effect of thread length on completion time

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Comparing short vs long thread efficiency - 4.4 second improvement

confidence_rationale: This is instructional content with narration, text overlays, and educational comparisons - not a performance to be scored
technique_summary: Educational video demonstrating suturing contest tips and techniques rather than an actual task performance
